column1: # Grounding benchmark seed suite.  Columns: name<TAB>repo<TAB>spec
# repo: a local path OR url@commit (pinned for reproducibility).
# spec: repo-root-relative path to the *full* Repository Specification to score.
# NOTE: only full 19-section reference specs belong here. The held-out "candidate
# regeneration" stubs (six, escape-string-regexp) are abbreviated and are intentionally
# excluded — scoring 0/0 citations would vacuously inflate the aggregate.
